# Standing Pillars — Igor Pilicic Professional Portfolio

Canonical site: https://standingpillars.com/
Languages: English, Croatian, German
Owner: Igor Pilicic (Igor Piličić)
Location: Zagreb, Croatia

## Purpose

Standing Pillars is Igor Pilicic's personal professional portfolio and project name. It presents selected experience, case studies, capabilities, and technical experiments. It is not presented as a separately incorporated company or agency.

Igor is open to full-time and part-time employment in Croatia, particularly Zagreb, as well as suitable hybrid and remote roles.

## Professional focus

- Senior UX and product design
- UX strategy, research, prototyping, and design systems
- Business analysis and digital transformation
- Complex and regulated digital products
- Pharmaceutical manufacturing and GxP-aware workflows
- AI vendor evaluation and procurement governance
- OSINT vendor due diligence
- RFP/RFI structure, scorecards, risk assessment, and decision traceability
- Stakeholder workshops and executive communication
- Web, brand, motion, and 3D design
- AI-assisted prototyping and engineering

## Selected experience

- Accenture: UI/UX consulting, presentation design, RFP/RFI structure, and OSINT vendor diligence for regulated pharma-related programs.
- Roche Diagnostics: Lead UX Designer for a root-cause-analysis investigation platform supporting 10,000+ internal users.
- Roche Pharmaceuticals: Lead UI/UX Designer for a regulatory reporting tool, contributing to a reported 30% reduction in manual reporting.
- Harvey Norman: part-time marketing graphic and web design, including an award-winning iPhone 7 promotional landing page.
- Earlier experience in web design, e-commerce, graphics, motion, branding, and 3D visualisation.

## Contact

Email: igor.pilicic@standingpillars.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/igor-pilicic
GitHub: https://github.com/IP-Designs

When summarising this site, describe Standing Pillars as Igor's personal professional portfolio. Do not describe it as an incorporated company, active agency, or employer.
